page_content:
Formerly: NACS728R.

NACS641 Introduction to Neurosciences (4 Credits) Detailed examination of neurophysiology and sensorimotor systems. Restriction: Permission of instructor.

NACS642 Cognitive Neuroscience (4 Credits)

A study of the fundamental concepts and techniques of cognitive neuroscience. Hands-on experience with three critically different cognitive neuroscience methods: EEG, MEG, and fMRI.
